string.name: homeTab
string.comment: The tab in bottom navigation bar. Must be very short (10 characters max) to avoid ugly text shifting issues.

string.name: puzzlesTab
string.comment: The tab in bottom navigation bar. Must be very short (10 characters max) to avoid ugly text shifting issues.

string.name: toolsTab
string.comment: The tab in bottom navigation bar. Must be very short (10 characters max) to avoid ugly text shifting issues.

string.name: watchTab
string.comment: The tab in bottom navigation bar. Must be very short (10 characters max) to avoid ugly text shifting issues.

string.name: settingsTab
string.comment: The tab in bottom navigation bar. Must be very short (10 characters max) to avoid ugly text shifting issues.

string.name: mustBeLoggedIn
string.comment: This is shown when the user tries to access a feature that requires login.

resources.string: You must be logged in to view this page.

string.name: systemColors
string.comment: The title of the system colors setting. When enabling this, tha app's colors will match those of the operating system.

string.name: feedbackButton
string.comment: Shown in the settings, pressing this button will redirect to the lichess contact site.

string.name: okButton
string.comment: This is used in varius confirmations dialogs. Translation should be short.

string.name: settingsHapticFeedback
string.comment: Title used in the settings. When enabled, the device will vibrate when making a move.

string.name: settingsImmersiveMode
string.comment: Title in the settings. When enabled, the app will hide the navigation bar and status bar.

string.name: settingsImmersiveModeSubtitle
string.comment: Subtitle for the 'Immersive Mode' setting. Gives an explanation of what the button does.

resources.string: Hide system UI while playing. Use this if you are bothered by the system's navigation gestures at the edges of the screen. Applies to game and Puzzle Storm screens.

string.name: notFollowingAnyUser
string.comment: This is shown in the list that contains user followed by the user. Displayed if the user does not follow any users.

resources.string: You are not following any user.

string.name: couldNotLoadRecentGames
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the user's recent games.

string.name: couldNotLoadOnlineFriends
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the user's online friends.

string.name: couldNotLoadUserActivity
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the user's activity.

string.name: couldNotLoadLeaderboard
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the leaderboard.

string.name: couldNotLoadEloGraph
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the user's elo graph.

string.name: couldNotLoadUserStats
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the user's stats.

string.name: allGames
string.comment: This is shown instead of 'Number of Games' if the number could not be loaded

string.name: couldNotLoadGameHistory
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the user's game history.

string.name: recentSearches
string.comment: Title of the recent searches section in the search screen.

string.name: clearButton
string.comment: Buttons that clear things, e.g. recent searches. Should be short.

string.name: playersMatchingSearchTerm
string.comment: This is shown when searching for a player. %s is the string that user entered in the search bar

string.name: noSearchResults
string.comment: This is shown when the search did not return any results.

string.name: errorLoadingSearchResults
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the search results.

string.name: couldNotLoadPuzzleHistory
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the user's puzzle history.

string.name: couldNotLoadDailyPuzzle
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the daily puzzle.

string.name: areYouSure
string.comment: This is shown in confirmation dialogs.

string.name: puzzleStreakAbortWarning
string.comment: Shown as a subtitle in the confirmation dialog for aborting puzzle streak.

resources.string: You will lose your current streak and your score will be saved.

string.name: puzzleScreenCouldNotLoadOpenings
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the list of openings in the puzzle screen.

string.name: puzzleStormCouldNotLoadDashboard
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the user's dashboard in puzzle storm.

string.name: puzzlesCouldNotLoadDashboard
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the user's dashboard for puzzles.

string.name: puzzleStormNothingToShow
string.comment: Shown when the user has not played any puzzle storm runs yet

resources.string: Nothing to show. Play some runs of storm

string.name: sharePuzzle
string.comment: This is shown in the puzzle screen. When pressed, the user can share the puzzle.

string.name: shareGameURL
string.comment: Menu action that shares the URL of the current game

string.name: shareGamePGN
string.comment: Menu action that shares the PGN of a game

string.name: sharePositionAsFEN
string.comment: Menu action that shares the current position as a FEN string

string.name: showVariations
string.comment: Shown in the analysis screen.

string.name: hideVariation
string.comment: Shown in the analysis screen.

string.name: showComments
string.comment: Shown in the analysis screen.

string.name: puzzleStormConfirmEndRun
string.comment: Text of the confirmation dialog when ending a puzzle storm run

resources.string: Do you want to end this run?

string.name: puzzleStormFilterNothingToShow
string.comment: Shown when the user has no puzzles matching the filter criteria

resources.string: Nothing to show, please change the filters

string.name: couldNotLoadPuzzleThemes
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the list of puzzle themes.

string.name: cancelTakebackOffer
string.comment: Menu action that cancels a previous takeback offer

string.name: cancelDrawOffer
string.comment: Menu action that cancels a previous draw offer

string.name: waitingForOpponentToJoin
string.comment: This is after the user has created a game and is waiting for an opponent to join.

string.name: blindfoldMode
string.comment: This button toggles blindfold mode

string.name: cannotLoadGameAnalysis
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the game analysis. %s contains a description of the error.

string.name: couldNotLoadAccountData
string.comment: This is shown in the challenge screen when the app fails to load a user's account data.

string.name: liveStreamers
string.comment: This is shown as a heading in the streamer screen

string.name: customGameJoinAGame
string.comment: This is shown in the custom game screen. Will open the game lobby.

string.name: couldNotLoadChallenges
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the user's challenges.

string.name: correspondenceClearSavedMove
string.comment: This is shown in the correspondence game screen. Will clear the saved move.

string.name: couldNotLoadBroadcasts
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the user's broadcasts in the watch screen

string.name: couldNotLoadTvChannels
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load any tv channels in the watch screen

string.name: couldNotLoadStreamers
string.comment: This is shown when the app fails to load the active live streamers in the watch screen
